name: Wave Entry after 6m base accumulation target20 long history
method: Uses long history from 2022-01-01 instead of app default 2025-01-01 to provide enough data for 6m base + OOS + target20. Exit: target +20%, take 50% at +20%, trailing stop for remaining 50% at max(entry+1%, peak-8%), initial stop 8%, horizon 84 sessions. Output saved; web should only read cache.
